title: Meds and Herbs: Automated
description: Automation of Meds and Herbs with Create!
body:
## Features

This mod adds the compatibility for the Meds and Herbs mod and the Create mod! 

This mod allows the full automation of ethanol, methanol and all the powders, extracts, medicines, poisons etc.

**You can also sell most of the extracts, medicines, dressings etc. to the Pharmacist.**

![Items list of all the items of this mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25601602e5f6f0b06f84c94a38cdd5c4795b3c52.png)

### Few Notable Items

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Yeast: Allows for Fermentation and alternate Dough production.
- Flour with Yeast: Produces more Dough.
- Denatured Ethanol and Diluted Ethanol.
- Cotton Fabric soaked in Denatured Ethanol: Allows for a Blazeburner to be Superheated.

</details>

### Modpack Policy

Just follow the EULA, nothing more, nothing less.


### Backporting and Different Ports
No plans on backporting and definitely no plans on porting to Fabric even if Meds And Herbs ports to Fabric.
 
### Credits
Massive thanks for [ChebyPattern](https://modrinth.com/user/ChebyPattern) for allowing me to use some of his item textures and helping me with some of the item textures, in addition to letting me make this mod!
